parameters.query: UPDATE sync_runs SET status='failed', error_message='timeout (sweep)', finished_at=NOW() WHERE status='running' AND started_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours'; SELECT last_mod_end_date FROM sync_state WHERE sync_type='nvd_cves';
INSERT INTO sync_runs (sync_type, window_start, window_end, status) VALUES ('nvd_cves', $1::timestamptz, $2::timestamptz, 'running') RETURNING id;
UPDATE sync_runs SET finished_at = NOW(), pages_fetched = $2::int, cves_upserted = $3::int, total_results = $4::int, status = 'success' WHERE id = $1::bigint;

INSERT INTO sync_state (sync_type, last_mod_end_date, last_sync_at, last_total_results, status, updated_at) VALUES ('nvd_cves', $1::timestamptz, NOW(), $2::int, 'success', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (sync_type) DO UPDATE SET last_mod_end_date = GREATEST(sync_state.last_mod_end_date, EXCLUDED.last_mod_end_date), last_sync_at = EXCLUDED.last_sync_at, last_total_results = EXCLUDED.last_total_results, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = NOW();
